title: Executive Protocol Training
subtitle: Customized capacity-building for diplomatic and institutional teams
public_description: Customized training modules for diplomatic cadets, foreign service officers, and institutional staff. Covers precedence, ceremonial discipline, contingency planning, and cross-cultural protocol standards.
target_audience: Diplomatic academies, foreign ministries, military protocol units, large NGOs.
delivery_format: Half-day or full-day institutional training module (online or in-person).

title: Institutional Protocol Audit
subtitle: Comprehensive review of protocol SOPs and ceremonial frameworks
public_description: A strategic review of an institution's existing protocol SOPs, ceremonial frameworks, and diplomatic communication channels. Delivered as a comprehensive advisory report with actionable recommendations.
target_audience: Newly established embassies, international organizations, corporate government-affairs divisions.
delivery_format: Institutional audit report and strategic advisory engagement.

title: PSPI Assessment
subtitle: Protocol Soft Power Index evaluation for state visits and summits
public_description: Application of the WPA Protocol Soft Power Index (PSPI) methodology to assess the ceremonial signalling, soft power projection, and diplomatic choreography of specific state visits or institutional engagements.
target_audience: Foreign ministries, advanced think tanks, geopolitical risk consultancies.
delivery_format: Bespoke advisory engagement and analytical report.

title: China Protocol Corpus Briefing
subtitle: State visit protocol, diplomatic choreography, and soft power
public_description: A comprehensive briefing on the protocol architecture of high-level state visits to the PRC. Covers ceremonial space, delegation composition, media framing, and the application of the WPA Protocol Soft Power Index (PSPI).
target_audience: Think tanks, Asian studies departments, diplomatic academies, risk consultancies.
delivery_format: Paid executive PDF report, 90-minute online briefing, or customized institutional training.

title: Visual Statecraft & Diplomatic Signalling
subtitle: Public-source analysis of ceremonial sequencing and visual statecraft
public_description: Public-source analysis of ceremonial sequencing, reception architecture, and visual statecraft. Designed for geopolitical analysts and risk consultancies seeking to decode high-level diplomatic choreography and symbolic hospitality.
target_audience: Geopolitical risk consultancies, public-source analysis teams, academic public-source researchers.
delivery_format: Paid executive PDF report or 90-minute online executive briefing.
